description: Splunk dashboard for monitoring Windows security logs and detecting brute force login attempts.

panels.title: Failed Login Attempts
panels.search_query: index=wineventlog EventCode=4625 | stats count by Account_Name, Source_Network_Address

panels.title: Successful Login Attempts
panels.search_query: index=wineventlog EventCode=4624 | stats count by Account_Name, Source_Network_Address

panels.title: Brute Force Detection
panels.search_query: index=wineventlog EventCode=4625 | stats count by Source_Network_Address | where count > 5
